notes: Adds optional Yandex OAuth 2.0 fallback login via authorization-code flow when the URL key is missing
Yandex login is accepted only after API Yandex ID returns a whitelisted phone number
OAuth sessions are stored as local HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Lax cookies; legacy URL-key auth remains unchanged
Explicit Yandex Redirect URI is supported for KeenDNS/Netcraze proxy deployments where CGI sees 127.0.0.1 as HTTP_HOST
Simple UI now shows a clear Yandex login screen on unauthorized URL-key/cookie state
Fast simple UI, Hysteria2 support, no-mux VLESS scan validation and safe server switching behavior are preserved
